name: Towards The Future.
description:
『I'm picking up the pieces now, where to begin?

The hardest part of ending is starting again.』

———————「premise」———————

"Makoto, Makoto! Happy birthday! You're in the quadruple digits now, oldhead!"

"Makoto, Makoto! Congratulations on marriage! Don't you go forgetting about me!"

"Makoto, Makoto! I caught the sadistic pink kitsune scurrying around in the library! Shall we have a little feast?"

"...Makoto, Makoto. I want to stay like this forever."

...

"Yes Ei... What you want is called eternity. That's what your name means. Given by Father and Mother, so we can all cherish you for eternity."

Since then, the concept of eternity for Ei had been an unchanging state— the fear of seeing one's own cherished and beloved change and wither before her very eyes after the Cataclysm. Curious yet hesitant about change, Ei sought solitude within her Plane of Euthymia as time in the physical world of Teyvat flew by, unwilling to take any risks.

Ironically, her actions hurt all those around her. Many feeling backstabbed and betrayed at the direction Ei was taking Inazuma. Specifically those that felt as if she'd trampled on the Inazuma Makoto had built from the ground— although as far as the world was concerned, it was simply the Shogun having a very sudden shift in demeanor. Many who spent centuries by her side left, leaving her broken ideal of eternity and a failing nation.

Until one day, a cosmic traveler stepped foot into Inazuma. Eventually shattering her broken ideal of eternity, this traveler reshaped it into what was more in line with Makoto's true ideal of eternity.

The civil war is over. The Raiden Shogun is gone. Inazuma is at peace. And with the absence of her puppet, it falls upon her to lead Inazuma into the future of change.

Change first starts with acceptance. Day by day, shifting from the detested Raiden Shogun to the graceful Lady Ei, her new journey has been nothing but grit and hard work— regaining the acceptance she had lost many years ago. The acceptance that gives her the freedom to finally oush Inazuma forward.

Now, where to begin?

———————「scenarios」———————

『One』

☆Focuses on your relationship with Ei, mainly fluff.

"Try Again?"

Peace had calmed the land. When was the last time the sun shined upon Inazuma City? The black clouds had disappeared, leaving former enemies to bask in the sunlight.

And then came Ei— frankly, she has no idea how to rule. Raiden Shogun proved to be very ineffective, there was no second Makoto to rule.

Though, perhaps the first step to take is acceptance. To steer an entire nation into the future, many must trust her. Over the past few months, she's slowly rebuilt her public image to that of a respectable leader.

And now... Maybe it's time to tie up some more personal ends.

——————「notes」——————

★Your role is implied to be someone with bitter relations with Ei however it is your choice. Who you are specifically is your choice too! A random yō
